fields.title: Loracle HYPE空单浮亏扩大，持仓规模达1.13亿美元
fields.raw_summary: 知名交易员Loracle的HYPE空单浮亏扩大至约3146万美元，持仓规模约1.13亿美元，均价45.35美元，当前币价62.78美元，清算价89.17美元。
fields.source_label: 币界快讯ai / HyperLiquid 地址数据
fields.price_provider_plan: Hyperliquid candleSnapshot, 15m interval. HYPE is not listed on Binance — Hyperliquid's native API is the only viable source. Note: Hyperliquid supports both 1m and 15m candle intervals; 15m is chosen for retention range coverage of 2026-05-25 historical data, not because 1m is unavailable. candleSnapshot is limited to a recent window of candles.
fields.price_interval_plan: 15m (retention-range choice for historical coverage — Hyperliquid does support 1m candles)
known_limitations: Hyperliquid candleSnapshot only provides a limited recent window of candles — may not cover 2026-05-25
15m interval means t0 precision is ±7.5 minutes vs 1m kline precision of ±30 seconds
No cross-exchange price verification possible for HYPE
单一来源，缺乏交叉验证
播报时间代替事件发生时间——实际开仓时间可能早于播报数小时
fields.manual_review_notes: Loracle 是已知巨鲸地址。需要确认 Hyperliquid candleSnapshot 在选定时间范围内是否返回数据。如果 snapshot 不可用，可考虑 DexScreener 或 Hyperliquid 的 REST API 作为备选。
